'''âf-f-t-d''' ('''kafaftedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lunge|lunge]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-f-t-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lunge|lunge]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-f-t-d
|-
! Lemma
| kafaftedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifaftedoko|thifaftedoko]] || [[word:jifaftedoko|jifaftedoko]] || [[word:shifaftedoko|shifaftedoko]] || [[word:kifaftedoko|kifaftedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufaftedoko|thuthufaftedoko]] || [[word:jujufaftedoko|jujufaftedoko]] || [[word:shushufaftedoko|shushufaftedoko]] || [[word:kukufaftedoko|kukufaftedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufaftedoko|thufaftedoko]] || [[word:jufaftedoko|jufaftedoko]] || [[word:shufaftedoko|shufaftedoko]] || [[word:kufaftedoko|kufaftedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufaftedoko|thufaftedoko]] || [[word:jufaftedoko|jufaftedoko]] || [[word:shufaftedoko|shufaftedoko]] || [[word:kufaftedoko|kufaftedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofaftedoko|thofaftedoko]] || [[word:jofaftedoko|jofaftedoko]] || [[word:shofaftedoko|shofaftedoko]] || [[word:kofaftedoko|kofaftedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfaftedoko|thĂŠfaftedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠfaftedoko|jĂŠfaftedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠfaftedoko|shĂŠfaftedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠfaftedoko|kĂŠfaftedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafaftedoko|thafaftedoko]] || [[word:jafaftedoko|jafaftedoko]] || [[word:shafaftedoko|shafaftedoko]] || [[word:kafaftedoko|kafaftedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafaftedoko|thafaftedoko]] || [[word:jafaftedoko|jafaftedoko]] || [[word:shafaftedoko|shafaftedoko]] || [[word:kafaftedoko|kafaftedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
